page.title: Settings
page.description: Manage your profile, team and account

empty.title: No API token
empty.description: Generate a token to authenticate calls to the public API.

usage.title: How to use
usage.description: Send the token in the Authorization header of every API request.

reveal.title: Save your API token
reveal.warning: This token is shown only once. Save it now — it won't be shown again.
reveal.label: API token

regenerateConfirm.title: Generate new token
regenerateConfirm.description: The current token will be revoked immediately and stop working. This action cannot be undone.

team.title: Users
team.emptyDesc: Invite team members to access the platform.
team.manageModulesDesc: Select the modules {{name}} will be able to access.
team.removeConfirmMsg: Do you want to remove {{name}} from the team? Their data will be kept.
team.promoteConfirmMsg: Do you want to promote {{name}} to Administrator? They will have full platform access.
team.inviteSubtitle: Select the modules this secretary will be able to access.
team.adminAllAccess: Administrators have access to all modules.

profile.documentLengthError: Invalid document — enter a CPF (11 digits) or CNPJ (14 digits).
profile.shareCode: Find me on Pombo! Add by code: #{{code}}

security.title: Security
security.description: We'll email you a link to create a new password.
security.resetEmailSent: We've sent a link to {{email}}. The link expires in 1 hour.
security.resetEmailError: Could not send the link. Please try again shortly.
